channel.title: Web-Ui on OpenSwap Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Web-Ui on OpenSwap Guide

item.title: Self-Hosted DNS Management Web UIs: PowerDNS Admin, Technitium DNS & Bind9 Webmin 2026
item.description: Managing DNS zones and records is a foundational task for any self-hosted infrastructure. Whether you run a home lab, manage domains for a small business, or operate DNS for an internal network, the right DNS management interface makes the difference between a five-second record update and a twenty-minute SSH session editing zone files by hand.
